# Digital Services Act

Jurisdiction: European Union / EEA
Region: EU
Citation: Regulation (EU) 2022/2065
Authority: European Union
Source URL: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX:32022R2065
Topics: notice_transparency, automated_decision_making, marketing_opt_out, children_data, accountability
Keywords: DSA, recommender systems, online platforms, targeted advertising, minors

## Summary
EU platform regulation with transparency, recommender-system, advertising, risk-assessment, and minor-protection duties that often intersect with personal data use.

## Key compliance obligations
- Disclose ad and recommender-system parameters where required.
- Avoid prohibited targeted advertising practices.
- Maintain systemic-risk and transparency controls for covered services.
